```json
          },
          "404": {
            "description": "No matching orders found"
          },
          "500": {
            "description": "Internal server error"
          },
          "422": {
            "description": "Validation Error",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "/place-orders": {
      "post": {
        "tags": [
          "Orders"
        ],
        "summary": "Place multiple betting orders",
        "description": "Validates and places orders through the configured bookmakers.\n\nEach order may specify a comma-separated `bookmakers` string or rely on\nauto-selection (missing/empty/\"*\").",
        "operationId": "place_orders_place_orders_post",
        "requestBody": {
          "content": {
            "application/json": {
              "schema": {
                "$ref": "#/components/schemas/PlaceOrdersRequest"
              },
              "example": {
                "orders": [
                  {
                    "requestUuid": "eb45b192-317b-42d5-9f65-af497b9fa8c1",
                    "fixtureId": "id1000004461512432",
                    "outcomeId": 103,
                    "playerId": 0,
                    "orderPrice": 1.95,
                    "orderStake": 10.0,
                    "userRef": "bettor1234",
                    "testOrder": false
                  },
                  {
                    "requestUuid": "fb5f2dd9-c855-4ba9-8ef9-4c2278ca2f1d",
                    "fixtureId": "id1000000758265385",
                    "outcomeId": 101,
                    "playerId": 0,
                    "orderPrice": 1.88,
                    "orderStake": 250.25,
                    "userRef": "bettor1234",
                    "testOrder": false,
                    "bookmakers": "pinnacle,vertex",
                    "orderCurrency": "USD",
                    "back": true,
                    "expiresAt": "2026-02-07T22:26:05Z",
                    "acceptBetterOdds": true,
                    "acceptPartialStake": true,
                    "meta": {
                      "strategy": "value",
                      "source": "api"
                    }
                  }
                ]
              }
            }
          },
          "required": true
        },
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "Order placement results with accepted and declined orders",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "title": "Response Place Orders Place Orders Post"
                },
                "example": {
                  "status": "partial-success",
                  "acceptedOrders": [
                    {
                      "orderId": 327,
                      "requestUuid": "eb45b192-317b-42d5-9f65-af497b9fa8c1",
                      "allowedBookmakers": "*",
                      "fixtureId": "id1000004461512432",
                      "outcomeId": 103,
                      "playerId": 0,
                      "orderPrice": 1.95,
                      "orderStake": 10.0,
                      "filledStake": 10.0,
                      "userRef": "bettor1234",
                      "testOrder": false,
                      "orderCurrency": "USD",
                      "back": true,
                      "expiresAt": "2026-02-07T17:29:37.311377+00:00",
                      "acceptBetterOdds": true,
                      "acceptPartialStake": true,
                      "clientName": "demo",
                      "orderStatus": "FILLED",
                      "createdAt": "2026-02-07T17:29:32.265368+00:00",
                      "updatedAt": "2026-02-07T17:29:32.265368+00:00",
                      "bets": [
                        {
                          "betId": 73,
                          "orderId": 327,
                          "bookmaker": "pinnacle",
                          "bookmakerBetId": "3332684214",
                          "placedPrice": 1.98,
                          "placedStake": 10.0,
                          "placedCurrency": "USD",
                          "placedAt": "2026-02-07T17:29:32+00:00",
                          "betStatus": "CONFIRMED",
                          "settlementStatus": "UNSETTLED",
                          "clientName": "demo",
                          "testBet": false,
                          "userRef": "bettor1234",
                          "requestUuid": "eb45b192-317b-42d5-9f65-af497b9fa8c1"
                        }
                      ],
                      "fixtureInfo": {
                        "fixtureId": "id1000004461512432",
                        "status": {
                          "live": false,
                          "statusId": 0,
                          "statusName": "Pre-Game"
                        },
                        "sport": {
                          "sportId": 10,
                          "sportName": "Soccer"
                        },
                        "tournament": {
                          "tournamentId": 44,
                          "tournamentName": "2. Bundesliga",
                          "categoryName": "Germany"
                        },
                        "startTime": 1754159400,
                        "participants": {
                          "participant1Id": 2540,
                          "participant1Name": "Arminia Bielefeld",
                          "participant2Id": 2588,
                          "participant2Name": "Fortuna Dusseldorf"
                        }
                      },
                      "outcomeInfo": {
                        "marketId": 101,
                        "marketName": "Full Time Result",
                        "marketNameShort": "1X2",
                        "marketType": "1x2",
                        "period": "fulltime",
                        "playerProp": false,
                        "handicap": 0,
                        "outcomeId": 103,
                        "outcomeName": "2"
                      },
                      "currencyInfo": {
                        "currency": "USD",
                        "currencyValue": 1.0
                      }
                    }
                  ],
                  "declinedOrders": [
                    {
                      "requestUuid": "fb5f2dd9-c855-4ba9-8ef9-4c2278ca2f1d",
                      "allowedBookmakers": "vertex",
                      "fixtureId": "id1000004461512432",
                      "outcomeId": 103,
                      "playerId": 0,
                      "orderPrice": 1.95,
                      "orderStake": 10.0,
                      "userRef": "bettor1234",
                      "testOrder": false,
                      "orderCurrency": "USD",
                      "back": true,
                      "clientName": "demo",
                      "declineReason": "Odds temporarily unavailable; please retry",
                      "bets": []
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            }
          },
          "400": {
            "description": "Validation error or all orders declined",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "example": {
                  "status": "declined",
                  "acceptedOrders": [],
                  "declinedOrders": [
                    {
                      "requestUuid": "fb5f2dd9-c855-4ba9-8ef9-4c2278ca2f1d",
                      "fixtureId": "id1000004461512432",
                      "outcomeId": 103,
                      "declineReason": "Order stake 100.00 USD exceeds available limit 50.00 USD",
                      "bets": []
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            }
          },
          "409": {
            "description": "All orders are duplicates",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "example": {
                  "error": "All orders are duplicates",
                  "duplicateUuids": [
                    "eb45b192-317b-42d5-9f65-af497b9fa8c1"
                  ],
                  "inProgressUuids": []
                }
              }
            }
          },
          "422": {
            "description": "Validation Error",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "/cancel-all-orders": {
      "post": {
        "tags": [
          "Orders",
          "Orders"
        ],
        "summary": "Cancel all pending orders",
        "description": "Cancel ALL pending and partial-placed orders for the authenticated client.\nOnly cancels orders without placed bets.",
        "operationId": "cancel_all_orders_cancel_all_orders_post",
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "Cancellation result with enriched order details",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "title": "Response Cancel All Orders Cancel All Orders Post"
                },
                "example": {
                  "status": "cancelled",
                  "cancelledCount": 1,

  },
  "components": {
    "schemas": {
      "AccountCreateRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "bookmaker": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Bookmaker",
            "description": "Bookmaker slug (e.g., 'pinnacle')"
          },
          "username": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Username",
            "description": "Account username"
          },
          "password": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Password",
            "description": "Account password"
          },
          "balance": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Balance",
            "description": "Initial balance",
            "default": 0.0
          },
          "active": {
            "type": "boolean",
            "title": "Active",
            "description": "Whether account is active",
            "default": true
          },
          "priority": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Priority",
            "description": "Priority for account selection (higher = preferred)",
            "default": 0
          },
          "maxStake": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Maxstake",
            "description": "Maximum stake override"
          },
          "minStake": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Minstake",
            "description": "Minimum stake override"
          },
          "currencyId": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Currencyid",
            "description": "Account's trading currency (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR')",
            "default": "USD"
          },
          "meta": {
            "additionalProperties": true,
            "type": "object",
            "title": "Meta",
            "description": "Additional metadata"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "bookmaker",
          "username"
        ],
        "title": "AccountCreateRequest",
        "description": "Request body for creating an account."
      },
      "AccountUpdateRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "password": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Password"
          },
          "balance": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Balance"
          },
          "active": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Active"
          },
          "priority": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Priority"
          },
          "maxStake": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],

          },
          "minStake": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Minstake"
          },
          "currencyId": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Currencyid"
          },
          "meta": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "additionalProperties": true,
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Meta"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "title": "AccountUpdateRequest",
        "description": "Request body for updating an account."
      },
      "BetResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "betId": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Betid"
          },
          "orderId": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Orderid"
          },
          "bookmaker": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Bookmaker"
          },
          "betStatus": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Betstatus"
          },
          "settlementStatus": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Settlementstatus"
          },
          "clientName": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Clientname"
          },
          "testBet": {
            "type": "boolean",
            "title": "Testbet"
          },
          "requestUuid": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Requestuuid"
          },
          "bookmakerBetId": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Bookmakerbetid"
          },
          "betRequestId": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Betrequestid"
          },
          "placedPrice": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Placedprice"
          },
          "placedStake": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Placedstake"
          },
          "placedCurrency": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Placedcurrency"
          },
          "placedAt": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Placedat"
          },
          "declineReason": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Declinereason"
          },
          "userRef": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Userref"
          },
          "account": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Account"
          },
          "sentData": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "additionalProperties": true,
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Sentdata"
          },
          "receivedData": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "additionalProperties": true,
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Receiveddata"
          },
          "currencyInfo": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "additionalProperties": true,
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Currencyinfo"
          },
          "settledAt": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Settledat"
          },
          "settlementAmount": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Settlementamount"
          },
          "settlementReason": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Settlementreason"
          },
          "oddsInfo": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "additionalProperties": true,
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Oddsinfo"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "betId",
          "orderId",
          "bookmaker",
          "betStatus",
          "settlementStatus",
          "clientName",
          "testBet",
          "requestUuid"
        ],
        "title": "BetResponse",
        "description": "Response model for a single bet."
      },
      "BetsResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "status": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Status",
            "default": "success"
          },
          "bets": {
            "items": {
              "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BetResponse"
            },
            "type": "array",
            "title": "Bets"
          },
          "count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Count"
          },
          "hasMore": {
            "type": "boolean",
            "title": "Hasmore",
            "default": false
          },
          "nextCursor": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Nextcursor"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "bets",
          "count"
        ],
        "title": "BetsResponse",
        "description": "Response model for bets endpoint."
      },
      "CancelOrdersRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "orderIds": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "items": {
                  "type": "integer"
                },
                "type": "array",
                "minItems": 1
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Orderids",
            "description": "List of numeric order IDs to cancel",
            "example": [
              123,
              456
            ]
          },
          "requestUuids": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "items": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "format": "uuid4"
                },
                "type": "array",
                "minItems": 1
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Requestuuids",
            "description": "List of request UUIDs to cancel",
            "example": [
              "eb45b192-317b-42d5-9f65-af497b9fa8c1"
            ]
          },
          "userRef": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string",
                "minLength": 1
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Userref",
            "description": "Cancel all orders matching this user reference",
            "example": "bettor1234"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "title": "CancelOrdersRequest",
        "description": "Request body for the POST /cancel-orders endpoint.\n\nCancel one or more pending orders. At least one filter must be provided.\nMultiple filters are combined with OR logic.\n\n## Behavior\n- Only orders in \"pending\" or \"partial-placed\" status can be cancelled\n- Orders with placed bets may not be fully cancellable (bookmaker-dependent)\n- Cancelled orders are marked in the database and signaled to stop retry loops\n\n## Response\nReturns cancelled orders and any that couldn't be cancelled with reasons."
      },
      "HTTPValidationError": {
        "properties": {
          "detail": {
            "items": {
              "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ValidationError"
            },
            "type": "array",
            "title": "Detail"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "title": "HTTPValidationError"
      },
      "PlaceOrderRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "requestUuid": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1,
            "title": "Requestuuid",
            "description": "Unique idempotency key for this order. Duplicate UUIDs within 5 minutes are rejected.",
            "example": "eb45b192-317b-42d5-9f65-af497b9fa8c1"
          },
          "fixtureId": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1,
            "title": "Fixtureid",
            "description": "OddsPAPI fixture identifier (e.g., 'id1000004461512432')",
            "example": "id1000004461512432"
          },
          "outcomeId": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Outcomeid",
            "description": "Outcome/market ID from OddsPAPI (e.g., 103 for Match Winner Home)",
            "example": 103
          },
          "playerId": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Playerid",
            "description": "Player ID for player prop markets. Use 0 for non-player markets.",
            "example": 0
          },
          "orderPrice": {
            "type": "number",
            "exclusiveMinimum": 0.0,
            "title": "Orderprice",
            "description": "Minimum acceptable decimal odds. Bets will only be placed at this price or better.",
            "example": 1.95
          },
          "orderStake": {
            "type": "number",
            "exclusiveMinimum": 0.0,
            "title": "Orderstake",
            "description": "Stake amount in orderCurrency. Must be within bookmaker min/max limits.",
            "example": 10.0
          },
          "userRef": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1,
            "title": "Userref",
            "description": "Your reference string for grouping/filtering orders (e.g., user ID, session ID)",
            "example": "bettor1234"
          },
          "testOrder": {
            "type": "boolean",
            "title": "Testorder",
            "description": "If true, order is validated and persisted but NOT placed with bookmaker. Use for testing.",
            "example": false
          },
          "bookmakers": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Bookmakers",
            "description": "Comma-separated bookmaker slugs to target (e.g., 'pinnacle,bet365'). Use '*' or omit for automatic selection among all allowed bookmakers.",
            "example": "pinnacle,vertex"
          },
          "orderCurrency": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1,
            "title": "Ordercurrency",
            "description": "ISO 4217 currency code for orderStake. Converted to bookmaker currency at placement.",
            "default": "USD",
            "example": "USD"
          },
          "back": {
            "type": "boolean",
            "title": "Back",
            "description": "Bet direction. True = back bet (win if selection wins). False = lay bet (win if selection loses).",
            "default": true,
            "example": true
          },
          "expiresAt": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Expiresat",
            "description": "ISO 8601 timestamp when order expires. Defaults to 5 seconds from now if not provided. Order stops trying to place after this time.",
            "example": "2024-01-15T12:00:05Z"
          },
          "acceptBetterOdds": {
            "type": "boolean",
            "title": "Acceptbetterodds",
            "description": "Accept odds better than orderPrice. If false, only exact price or worse is accepted.",
            "default": true,
            "example": true
          },
          "acceptPartialStake": {
            "type": "boolean",
            "title": "Acceptpartialstake",
            "description": "Allow partial stake fills when full stake exceeds bookmaker limit.",
            "default": true,
            "example": true
          },
          "meta": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "additionalProperties": true,
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Meta",
            "description": "Custom metadata object. Stored with order but not sent to bookmaker.",
            "example": {
              "source": "api",
              "strategy": "value"
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "requestUuid",
          "fixtureId",
          "outcomeId",
          "playerId",
          "orderPrice",
          "orderStake",
          "userRef",
          "testOrder"
        ],
        "title": "PlaceOrderRequest",
        "description": "Single order payload for the place-orders endpoint.\n\nThis model represents the shape of an incoming order before\nserver-side enrichment and bookmaker selection.\n\n## Required Fields\n- `requestUuid`: Idempotency key - prevents duplicate order placement\n- `fixtureId`: OddsPAPI fixture ID (e.g., \"id1000004461512432\")\n- `outcomeId`: Market outcome ID (e.g., 103 for Match Winner Home)\n- `playerId`: Player ID for player props (use 0 for non-player markets)\n- `orderPrice`: Minimum acceptable decimal odds (e.g., 1.95)\n- `orderStake`: Stake amount in orderCurrency\n- `userRef`: Your reference for grouping/tracking orders\n- `testOrder`: If true, order is validated but not placed with bookmaker\n\n## Optional Fields\n- `bookmakers`: Target specific bookmakers (comma-separated or \"*\" for all)\n- `orderCurrency`: Currency code (default: \"USD\")\n- `back`: True for back bets, false for lay bets (default: true)\n- `expiresAt`: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp (default: 5 seconds from now)\n- `acceptBetterOdds`: Accept odds better than orderPrice (default: true)\n- `acceptPartialStake`: Allow partial fills (default: true)\n- `meta`: Custom metadata object"
      },
      "PlaceOrdersRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "orders": {
            "items": {
              "$ref": "#/components/schemas/PlaceOrderRequest"
            },
            "type": "array",
            "maxItems": 100,
            "minItems": 1,
            "title": "Orders",
            "description": "List of orders to place. Each order is processed independently. Maximum 100 orders per request."
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "orders"
        ],
        "title": "PlaceOrdersRequest",
        "description": "Request body for the POST /place-orders endpoint.\n\nSubmit one or more betting orders for placement with bookmakers.\nEach order is independently validated and placed.\n\n## Response\nReturns a JSON object with:\n- `status`: \"success\" | \"partial-success\" | \"declined\"\n- `acceptedOrders`: List of successfully placed/pending orders with bets\n- `declinedOrders`: List of orders that failed validation with reasons\n\n## Idempotency\nEach order's `requestUuid` is used as an idempotency key. Duplicate\nUUIDs within 5 minutes are rejected to prevent double-placement."
      },
      "PnlEntry": {
        "properties": {
          "bookmaker": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Bookmaker"
          },
          "account": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Account"
          },
          "userRef": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Userref"
          },
          "settledBets": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Settledbets"
          },
          "wins": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Wins"
          },
          "losses": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Losses"
          },
          "voids": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Voids"
          },
          "pushes": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Pushes"
          },
          "totalStaked": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Totalstaked"
          },
          "totalWon": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Totalwon"
          },
          "totalLost": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Totallost"
          },
          "netPnl": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Netpnl"
          },
          "winRate": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Winrate"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "settledBets",
          "wins",
          "losses",
          "voids",
          "pushes",
          "totalStaked",
          "totalWon",
          "totalLost",
          "netPnl"
        ],
        "title": "PnlEntry",
        "description": "A single aggregated PnL row."
      },
      "PnlResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "status": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Status",
            "default": "success"
          },
          "groupBy": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Groupby"
          },
          "pnl": {
            "items": {
              "$ref": "#/components/schemas/PnlEntry"
            },
            "type": "array",
            "title": "Pnl"
          },
          "count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Count"
          },
          "totalNetPnl": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Totalnetpnl"
          },
          "totalStaked": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Totalstaked"
          },
          "totalSettledBets": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Totalsettledbets"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "groupBy",
          "pnl",
          "count",
          "totalNetPnl",
          "totalStaked",
          "totalSettledBets"
        ],
        "title": "PnlResponse",
        "description": "Response for the PnL endpoint."
      },
      "PositionEntry": {
        "properties": {
          "bookmaker": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Bookmaker"
          },
          "account": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Account"
          },
          "userRef": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Userref"
          },
          "openBets": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Openbets"
          },
          "totalStake": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Totalstake"
          },
          "avgPrice": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Avgprice"
          },
          "fixtureIds": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Fixtureids"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "openBets",
          "totalStake"
        ],
        "title": "PositionEntry",
        "description": "A single aggregated position row."
      },
      "PositionsResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "status": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Status",
            "default": "success"
          },
          "groupBy": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Groupby"
          },
          "positions": {
            "items": {
              "$ref": "#/components/schemas/PositionEntry"
            },
            "type": "array",
            "title": "Positions"
          },
          "count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Count"
          },
          "totalStake": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Totalstake"
          },
          "totalOpenBets": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Totalopenbets"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "groupBy",
          "positions",
          "count",
          "totalStake",
          "totalOpenBets"
        ],
        "title": "PositionsResponse",
        "description": "Response for the positions endpoint."
      },
      "ValidationError": {
        "properties": {
          "loc": {
            "items": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "integer"
                }
              ]
            },
            "type": "array",
            "title": "Location"
          },
          "msg": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Message"
          },
          "type": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Error Type"
          },
          "input": {
            "title": "Input"
          },
          "ctx": {
            "type": "object",
            "title": "Context"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "loc",
          "msg",
          "type"
        ],
        "title": "ValidationError"
      }
    },
    "securitySchemes": {
      "apiKey": {
        "type": "apiKey",
        "in": "header",
        "name": "X-ABP-API-KEY",
        "description": "API key for authentication. Contact admin to obtain a key."
      }
    }
  },
  "tags": [
    {
      "name": "Orders",
      "description": "Place, retrieve, and cancel betting orders"
    },
    {
      "name": "Bets",
      "description": "Query individual bets placed with bookmakers"
    },
    {
      "name": "Betslip",
      "description": "Get live odds and metadata for fixtures"
    },
    {
      "name": "Accounts",
      "description": "Manage bookmaker accounts"
    },
    {
      "name": "Markets",
      "description": "Get available markets and odds types"
    },
    {
      "name": "Bookmakers",
      "description": "List supported bookmakers"
    }
  ],
  "security": [
    {
      "apiKey": []
    }
  ]
}
```


---
## OpenAPI (REST Reference)
Source: /mm-api/openapi.json
---

```json
{
  "openapi": "3.1.0",
  "info": {
    "title": "MM-V2 Trading API",
    "description": "\n## High-Frequency Market Making Engine API\n\nThis API powers the MM-V2 market making system, providing:\n\n### For Trading Clients\n- **Orders**: View and track orders placed on exchanges (Polymarket, Kalshi, etc.)\n- **Bets**: View hedge bets placed on bookmakers\n- **Fixtures**: Access event/fixture metadata and scores\n- **Positions**: Get aggregated exposure across markets\n\n### Authentication\nClient endpoints require the `X-API-Key` header with a valid UUID.\n\n### Rate Limits\n- REST API: 100 requests/minute per client\n- WebSocket: 5 connections per API key\n\n### Quick Start\n1. Click **Authorize** button above\n2. Enter your API key (UUID format)\n3. All client endpoints will use this key automatically\n        ",
    "version": "1.0.0"
  },
  "servers": [
    {
      "url": "https://mmapi.55-tech.com",
      "description": "Production"
    }
  ],
  "paths": {
    "/api/v1/me": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "Get current client info",
        "description": "Returns the authenticated client's information based on their API key.",
        "operationId": "get_me_api_v1_me_get",
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "Successful Response",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ClientInfo"
                }
              }
            }
          },
          "401": {
            "description": "Invalid or missing API key"
          },
          "404": {
            "description": "Resource not found"
          },
          "422": {
            "description": "Validation Error",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        },
        "security": [
          {
            "ApiKeyAuth": []
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "/api/v1/orders": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "List orders",
        "description": "Retrieve a paginated list of orders for your client account.\n\n    Orders are sorted by creation date (newest first) and can be filtered by:\n    - **fixture_id**: Filter by specific fixture/event\n    - **exchange**: Filter by exchange (polymarket, kalshi, etc.)\n    - **status**: Filter by order status (PLACED, FILLED, CANCELLED, etc.)\n\n    Use pagination parameters to navigate through large result sets.",
        "operationId": "list_orders_api_v1_orders_get",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "fixture_id",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "description": "Filter by fixture ID",
              "title": "Fixture Id"
            },
            "description": "Filter by fixture ID"
          },
          {
            "name": "exchange",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "description": "Filter by exchange (polymarket, kalshi, etc.)",
              "title": "Exchange"
            },
            "description": "Filter by exchange (polymarket, kalshi, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "name": "status",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "description": "Filter by order status (PLACED, FILLED, CANCELLED)",
              "title": "Status"
            },
            "description": "Filter by order status (PLACED, FILLED, CANCELLED)"
          },
          {
            "name": "from_date",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "format": "date"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "description": "Filter orders created on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)",
              "title": "From Date"
            },
            "description": "Filter orders created on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)"
          },
          {
            "name": "to_date",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "format": "date"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "description": "Filter orders created on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)",
              "title": "To Date"
            },
            "description": "Filter orders created on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)"
          },
          {
            "name": "page",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "type": "integer",
              "minimum": 1,
              "description": "Page number (1-indexed)",
              "default": 1,
              "title": "Page"
            },
            "description": "Page number (1-indexed)"
          },
          {
            "name": "page_size",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "type": "integer",
              "maximum": 2000,
              "minimum": 1,
              "description": "Items per page (max 2000)",
              "default": 50,
              "title": "Page Size"
            },
            "description": "Items per page (max 2000)"
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "Paginated list of orders",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/PaginatedResponse"
                },
                "example": {
                  "data": [
                    {
                      "orderId": 123,
                      "fixtureId": "id1604296768235456",
                      "outcomeId": 161,
                      "exchange": "polymarket",
                      "orderStatus": "PLACED",
                      "orderStake": 100.0,
                      "matchedStake": 50.0
                    }
                  ],
                  "total": 100,
                  "page": 1,
                  "page_size": 50,
                  "total_pages": 2
                }
              }
            }
          },
          "401": {
            "description": "Invalid or missing API key"
          },
          "404": {
            "description": "Resource not found"
          },
          "422": {
            "description": "Validation Error",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        },
        "security": [
          {
            "ApiKeyAuth": []
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "/api/v1/orders/open": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "List open orders",

        "operationId": "list_open_orders_api_v1_orders_open_get",
        "parameters": [

                }

            }

          },
          "404": {

    "/api/v1/orders/{order_id}": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "Get order details",
        "description": "Retrieve detailed information about a specific order by its ID.",
        "operationId": "get_order_api_v1_orders__order_id__get",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "order_id",
            "in": "path",
            "required": true,
            "schema": {
              "type": "integer",
              "title": "Order Id"
            }
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "200": {

                "schema": {
                  "type": "object",

                }
              }
            }
          },
          "401": {
            "description": "Invalid or missing API key"
          },
          "404": {
            "description": "Resource not found"
          },
          "422": {
            "description": "Validation Error",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        },
        "security": [
          {
            "ApiKeyAuth": []
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "/api/v1/orders/summary": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "Get orders summary",
        "description": "Get aggregated statistics about all orders for your client account.\n\n    Optionally filter by date range to see statistics for a specific time period.",
        "operationId": "get_orders_summary_api_v1_orders_summary_get",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "from_date",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "format": "date"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "description": "Filter orders created on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)",
              "title": "From Date"
            },
            "description": "Filter orders created on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)"
          },
          {
            "name": "to_date",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "format": "date"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "description": "Filter orders created on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)",
              "title": "To Date"
            },
            "description": "Filter orders created on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)"
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "Successful Response",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/OrderSummary"
                }
              }
            }
          },
          "401": {
            "description": "Invalid or missing API key"
          },
          "404": {
            "description": "Resource not found"
          },
          "422": {
            "description": "Validation Error",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        },
        "security": [
          {
            "ApiKeyAuth": []
          }

    "/api/v1/bets": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "List bets",
        "description": "Retrieve a paginated list of hedge bets placed on your behalf.\n\n    Bets are created when orders are matched on exchanges. They represent\n    the hedging activity on the bookmaker side.\n\n    Filter by:\n    - **order_id**: Get bets for a specific order\n    - **bookmaker**: Filter by bookmaker (e.g., vertex, pinnacle)\n    - **status**: Filter by bet status - supports comma-separated values (e.g., `placed,pending`)\n      - `placed`: Successfully placed bets\n      - `pending`: Bets awaiting confirmation\n      - `declined`: Rejected bets",
        "operationId": "list_bets_api_v1_bets_get",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "order_id",

        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "List fixtures",
        "description": "Retrieve a paginated list of fixtures (events/matches).\n\n    Fixtures contain event metadata like participants, start time, and scores.\n\n    Filter by:\n    - **fixtureIds**: Filter by specific fixture IDs (repeated query param)\n    - **tournament_id**: Filter by tournament (e.g., 234 for NHL)\n    - **sport_id**: Filter by sport (e.g., 1 for Soccer)\n    - **live**: Filter by live status (true/false)\n    - **all**: Set to true to see all available fixtures (not just ones with your orders)",

    "/api/v1/markets": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "List markets for sport",
        "description": "Get available markets for a sport from cached odds data.\n\n    **Note:** Markets are global reference data - they describe what market types\n    exist (1x2, Over/Under, etc.) and are not specific to any client. All clients\n    see the same market definitions.\n\n    Markets are aggregated from all active fixtures for the specified sport.\n\n    **Required:**\n    - **sportId**: Get markets for a sport (e.g., 1=Soccer, 14=Ice Hockey)\n\n    **Response fields:**\n    - `marketId`: Market identifier\n    - `outcomeIds`: List of outcome IDs available for this market\n    - `playerIds`: List of player IDs (for player prop markets)\n    - `bookmakers`: Bookmakers offering this market",
        "operationId": "list_markets_api_v1_markets_get",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "sportId",
            "in": "query",
            "required": true,
            "schema": {
              "type": "integer",
              "description": "Sport ID (required)",
              "title": "Sportid"
            },
            "description": "Sport ID (required)"
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "Markets from cache",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "additionalProperties": true,
                  "title": "Response List Markets Api V1 Markets Get"
                },
                "example": {
                  "markets": [
                    {
                      "marketId": 1,
                      "outcomeIds": [
                        1,
                        2,
                        3
                      ],
                      "playerIds": [],
                      "bookmakers": [
                        "pinnacle"
                      ]
                    }
                  ],
                  "count": 1
                }
              }
            }
          },
          "401": {
            "description": "Invalid or missing API key"
          },
          "404": {
            "description": "Resource not found"
          },

    "/api/v1/players": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "List players for sport",
        "description": "Get players for a sport from cached odds data.\n\n    **Note:** Players are global reference data - they describe what players\n    have prop markets available. All clients see the same player data.\n\n    Players are aggregated from all active fixtures for the specified sport\n    where playerId > 0 (player prop markets).\n\n    **Required:**\n    - **sportId**: Get players for a sport (e.g., 1=Soccer, 14=Ice Hockey)\n\n    **Response fields:**\n    - `playerId`: Player identifier\n    - `marketIds`: Markets this player has props in\n    - `outcomeIds`: Outcome IDs for this player\n    - `bookmakers`: Bookmakers offering props for this player",
        "operationId": "list_players_api_v1_players_get",

              "title": "Sportid"
            },
            "description": "Sport ID (required)"

                        19

    "/api/v1/positions": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "List positions",
        "description": "Get aggregated positions for your client account.\n\n    A position aggregates all orders for a specific fixture/outcome/exchange combination,\n    showing total stake, matched stake, and open stake.\n\n    This gives you a consolidated view of your exposure on each market.\n\n    **Status filters** (supports comma-separated values, e.g., `open,matched`):\n    - `open`: Only positions with open orders (still on exchange, not fully matched)\n    - `matched`: Only positions with matched stake > 0 (excludes cancelled)\n    - `filled`: Only fully matched orders\n    - `cancelled`: Only cancelled orders\n    - `active`: Exclude cancelled orders (default)\n\n    Examples:\n    - `/positions?status=open` - Only open positions\n    - `/positions?status=open,matched` - Open or matched positions\n    - `/positions?status=filled` - Only filled positions\n\n    Optionally filter by date range to see positions from a specific time period.",
        "operationId": "list_positions_api_v1_positions_get",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "fixture_id",

                  "type": "null"

          }

      }
    },
    "/api/v1/pnl": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "Get profit and loss",
        "description": "Get profit and loss (PnL) statistics for your client account.\n\n    **Realized PnL**: Profit/loss from settled orders\n    - WON orders: profit = matchedStake * (1/probability - 1)\n    - LOST orders: loss = -matchedStake\n    - HALF_WON/HALF_LOST: 50% of the above\n\n    **Unrealized PnL**: Potential profit from open positions (if they win)\n    - Calculated as: matchedStake * (1/probability - 1) for all unsettled matched orders\n\n    Optionally filter by date range to see PnL for a specific time period.",
        "operationId": "get_pnl_api_v1_pnl_get",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "from_date",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "format": "date"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "description": "Filter orders created on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)",
              "title": "From Date"
            },
            "description": "Filter orders created on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)"
          },
          {
            "name": "to_date",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "format": "date"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "description": "Filter orders created on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)",
              "title": "To Date"
            },
            "description": "Filter orders created on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)"
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "PnL statistics",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/PnLResponse"
                },
                "example": {
                  "pnl": 54514.93,
                  "realized_pnl": 50000.0,
                  "unrealized_pnl": 4514.93,
                  "total_matched_stake": 100000.0,
                  "settled_count": 150,
                  "unsettled_count": 25,
                  "from_date": "2026-01-29",
                  "to_date": "2026-02-01"
                }
              }
            }
          },
          "401": {
            "description": "Invalid or missing API key"
          },
          "404": {
            "description": "Resource not found"
          },
          "422": {
            "description": "Validation Error",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        },
        "security": [
          {
            "ApiKeyAuth": []
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "/api/v1/accounts": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "List accounts",
        "description": "List exchange accounts configured for your client.\n\n    Returns account metadata without sensitive credentials.\n    Shows which exchanges you have accounts on and their configuration.",
        "operationId": "list_accounts_api_v1_accounts_get",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "exchange",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "description": "Filter by exchange",
              "title": "Exchange"
            },
            "description": "Filter by exchange"
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "Successful Response",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "additionalProperties": true,
                  "title": "Response List Accounts Api V1 Accounts Get"
                }
              }
            }
          },
          "401": {
            "description": "Invalid or missing API key"
          },
          "404": {
            "description": "Resource not found"
          },
          "422": {
            "description": "Validation Error",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        },
        "security": [
          {
            "ApiKeyAuth": []
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "/api/v1/orders/cancel-all": {
      "post": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "Cancel all open orders",
        "description": "Cancel ALL open orders for your client account across all exchanges.\n\n    **Use with caution** - this will cancel every open order you have.\n\n    Optionally filter by:\n    - **exchange**: Only cancel orders on a specific exchange\n    - **fixture_id**: Only cancel orders for a specific fixture",
        "operationId": "cancel_all_client_orders_api_v1_orders_cancel_all_post",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "exchange",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "description": "Filter by exchange",
              "title": "Exchange"
            },
            "description": "Filter by exchange"
          },
          {
            "name": "fixture_id",
            "in": "query",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "description": "Filter by fixture ID",
              "title": "Fixture Id"
            },
            "description": "Filter by fixture ID"
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "Successful Response",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "additionalProperties": true,
                  "title": "Response Cancel All Client Orders Api V1 Orders Cancel All Post"
                }
              }
            }
          },
          "401": {
            "description": "Invalid or missing API key"
          },
          "404": {
            "description": "Resource not found"
          },
          "422": {
            "description": "Validation Error",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }

            }
          }
        },
        "security": [
          {
            "ApiKeyAuth": []
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "/api/v1/orders/{order_id}/cancel": {
      "post": {
        "tags": [
          "Client API"
        ],
        "summary": "Cancel a specific order",
        "description": "Cancel a specific order by its ID.",
        "operationId": "cancel_order_api_v1_orders__order_id__cancel_post",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "order_id",
            "in": "path",
            "required": true,
            "schema": {
              "type": "integer",
              "title": "Order Id"
            }
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "Successful Response",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "additionalProperties": true,
                  "title": "Response Cancel Order Api V1 Orders  Order Id  Cancel Post"
                }
              }
            }
          },
          "401": {
            "description": "Invalid or missing API key"
          },
          "404": {
            "description": "Resource not found"
          },
          "422": {
            "description": "Validation Error",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        },
        "security": [
          {
            "ApiKeyAuth": []
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "/ws/subscribe": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "WebSocket"
        ],
        "summary": "Real-time Subscription (WebSocket)",
        "description": "## Real-time Data Subscription (WebSocket)\n\n**URL:** `wss://mmapi.55-tech.com/ws/subscribe`\n\n**Connection Limits:** Maximum 5 concurrent connections per API key.\n\n### Protocol\n\n1. **Connect** to `/ws/subscribe`\n\n2. **Subscribe** (within 30 seconds):\n```json\n{\n  \"type\": \"subscribe\",\n  \"api_key\": \"your-client-api-key-uuid\",\n  \"channels\": [\"orders\", \"bets\", \"accounts\", \"scores\", \"emergency\"]\n}\n```\n\n3. **Confirmation**:\n```json\n{\"type\": \"subscribed\", \"subscription_id\": 1, \"channels\": [\"orders\", \"bets\"]}\n```\n\n4. **Receive broadcasts**:\n```json\n{\n  \"type\": \"broadcast\",\n  \"channel\": \"orders\",\n  \"event\": \"UPDATE\",\n  \"payload\": {\"id\": 123, \"orderStatus\": \"FILLED\"},\n  \"old\": {\"orderStatus\": \"PLACED\"}\n}\n```\n\n5. **Keep-alive**: Send `{\"type\": \"ping\"}` \u2192 Receive `{\"type\": \"pong\"}`\n\n6. **Heartbeat**: Server sends `{\"type\": \"heartbeat\"}` every 60s\n\n7. **Unsubscribe**: Send `{\"type\": \"unsubscribe\"}`\n\n### Channels\n\n| Channel | Description | Filtered |\n|---------|-------------|----------|\n| `orders` | Order placement, updates, fills | By client |\n| `bets` | Hedge bet updates | By client |\n| `accounts` | Balance changes | By client |\n| `scores` | Live score updates | Global |\n| `emergency` | Emergency mode status | Global |\n\n### Error Codes\n\n- `api_key required` - Missing api_key\n- `Invalid api_key format` - Must be UUID\n- `Invalid API key` - Not found or inactive\n- `Connection limit exceeded` - Max 5 per API key",
        "operationId": "websocket_subscribe_docs_ws_subscribe_get",
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "Returns 426 - use WebSocket connection instead",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {}
              }
            }
          },
          "426": {
            "description": "Upgrade Required - Connect via WebSocket",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "example": {
                  "detail": "This endpoint requires a WebSocket connection. Use wss://mmapi.55-tech.com/ws/subscribe"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "components": {
    "schemas": {
      "BetSummary": {
        "properties": {
          "total_bets": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Total Bets",
            "description": "Total number of bets"
          },
          "order_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Order Count",
            "description": "Number of unique orders"
          },
          "bookmaker_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Bookmaker Count",
            "description": "Number of unique bookmakers"
          },
          "total_stake": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Total Stake",
            "description": "Sum of all bet stakes"
          },
          "avg_price": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Avg Price",
            "description": "Average bet price"
          },
          "placed_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Placed Count",
            "description": "Number of placed bets"
          },
          "pending_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Pending Count",
            "description": "Number of pending bets"
          },
          "declined_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Declined Count",
            "description": "Number of declined bets"
          },
          "won_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Won Count",
            "description": "Number of won bets"
          },
          "lost_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Lost Count",
            "description": "Number of lost bets"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "total_bets",
          "order_count",
          "bookmaker_count",
          "total_stake",
          "avg_price",
          "placed_count",
          "pending_count",
          "declined_count",
          "won_count",
          "lost_count"
        ],
        "title": "BetSummary",
        "description": "Summary of bet statistics for a client."
      },
      "ClientInfo": {
        "properties": {
          "client": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Client",
            "description": "Client identifier (e.g., 'demo', 'pinnacle')"
          },
          "clientName": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Clientname",
            "description": "Client display name (e.g., 'Demo', 'Pinnacle')"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "client",
          "clientName"
        ],
        "title": "ClientInfo",
        "description": "Client information from API key lookup."
      },
      "HTTPValidationError": {
        "properties": {
          "detail": {
            "items": {
              "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ValidationError"
            },
            "type": "array",
            "title": "Detail"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "title": "HTTPValidationError"
      },
      "OrderSummary": {
        "properties": {
          "total_orders": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Total Orders",
            "description": "Total number of orders"
          },
          "fixture_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Fixture Count",
            "description": "Number of unique fixtures"
          },
          "exchange_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Exchange Count",
            "description": "Number of unique exchanges"
          },
          "total_stake": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Total Stake",
            "description": "Sum of all order stakes"
          },
          "total_matched": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Total Matched",
            "description": "Sum of all matched stakes"
          },
          "total_open": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Total Open",
            "description": "Sum of open (unmatched) stakes"
          },
          "filled_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Filled Count",
            "description": "Number of filled orders"
          },
          "cancelled_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Cancelled Count",
            "description": "Number of cancelled orders"
          },
          "open_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Open Count",
            "description": "Number of open orders"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "total_orders",
          "fixture_count",
          "exchange_count",
          "total_stake",
          "total_matched",
          "total_open",
          "filled_count",
          "cancelled_count",
          "open_count"
        ],
        "title": "OrderSummary",
        "description": "Summary of order statistics for a client."
      },
      "PaginatedResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "data": {
            "items": {},
            "type": "array",
            "title": "Data",
            "description": "List of items for current page"
          },
          "total": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Total",
            "description": "Total number of items across all pages"
          },
          "page": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Page",
            "description": "Current page number (1-indexed)"
          },
          "page_size": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Page Size",
            "description": "Number of items per page"
          },
          "total_pages": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Total Pages",
            "description": "Total number of pages"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "data",
          "total",
          "page",
          "page_size",
          "total_pages"
        ],
        "title": "PaginatedResponse",
        "description": "Paginated response wrapper for list endpoints."
      },
      "PnLResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "pnl": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Pnl",
            "description": "Total PnL (realized + unrealized)"
          },
          "realized_pnl": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Realized Pnl",
            "description": "PnL from settled orders"
          },
          "unrealized_pnl": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Unrealized Pnl",
            "description": "Potential PnL from open positions"
          },
          "total_matched_stake": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Total Matched Stake",
            "description": "Total matched stake"
          },
          "settled_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Settled Count",
            "description": "Number of settled orders"
          },
          "unsettled_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Unsettled Count",
            "description": "Number of unsettled orders with matches"
          },
          "from_date": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string",
                "format": "date"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "From Date",
            "description": "Start date filter (if applied)"
          },
          "to_date": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string",
                "format": "date"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "To Date",
            "description": "End date filter (if applied)"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "pnl",
          "realized_pnl",
          "unrealized_pnl",
          "total_matched_stake",
          "settled_count",
          "unsettled_count",
          "from_date",
          "to_date"
        ],
        "title": "PnLResponse",
        "description": "Profit and Loss response for a client."
      },
      "ValidationError": {
        "properties": {
          "loc": {
            "items": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "integer"
                }
              ]
            },
            "type": "array",
            "title": "Location"
          },
          "msg": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Message"
          },
          "type": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Error Type"
          },
          "input": {
            "title": "Input"
          },
          "ctx": {
            "type": "object",
            "title": "Context"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "loc",
          "msg",
          "type"
        ],
        "title": "ValidationError"
      }
    },
    "securitySchemes": {
      "ApiKeyAuth": {
        "type": "apiKey",
        "in": "header",
        "name": "X-API-Key",
        "description": "Client API key (UUID format). Contact support@55-tech.com to obtain your key."
      }
    }
  },
  "tags": [
    {
      "name": "Client API",
      "description": "Endpoints for trading clients to access orders, bets, fixtures, and positions. Requires `X-API-Key` header authentication."
    },
    {
      "name": "WebSocket",
      "description": "Real-time data subscriptions for orders, bets, accounts, and scores."
    }
  ]
}
```
